authority_boundary: formalism-tests produces receipts. Site publishes receipts. Site must not become the authority for receipts.

pages.description: Release index for current transition-table proof surface.
pages.title: Transition Release Index

pages.description: Development status from Stage 2 through Stage 10.
pages.title: Transition Development Status

pages.description: Public mirror of transition proof status and release-candidate data.
pages.title: Transition Proof Surface

stages.label: Stage 2
stages.name: Same-data role dependence
stages.summary: Same data can produce different continuation decisions depending on role and consequence path.

stages.label: Stage 3
stages.name: Compound and temporal continuation
stages.summary: Local allow does not imply composite allow; commit-time state, replay semantics, recoverability, and inference windows matter.

stages.label: Stage 6
stages.name: Admissible Existence Unified Gate
stages.summary: Unified AE gate validates IW containment and RE bound across 10 candidates and 320 assertions.

stages.label: Stage 7
stages.name: Element Dependency Closure
stages.summary: Unlocked elements have declared dependencies and no Level 5 element depends on an uncovered dependency without explicit boundary.

stages.label: Stage 8
stages.name: AI Domain Transition Classes
stages.summary: AI governance, derivation, verification, quorum, hidden authority, closure, and scope transition classes are validated.

stages.label: Stage 9
stages.name: Multi-Body Coupling Closure
stages.summary: Admissibility cannot be evaluated in isolation when entities are coupled.

stages.label: Stage 10
stages.name: Canonical Transition Table Release
stages.summary: Canonical transition-table release candidate emits deterministic release, hash, replay packet, and release receipt.
